name: vibeide-neon
description: Default VibeIDE dark theme — vendored neon palette with separate settings ids so Marketplace color themes can replace it when installed.

commands.title: VibeIDE: Toggle Trust Score (Manual → Supervised → Auto)
VibeIDE: Set Trust Score to Manual 🟢
VibeIDE: Set Trust Score to Supervised 🟡
VibeIDE: Set Trust Score to Auto 🔴
VibeIDE: Freeze This Code for Agent
VibeIDE: Pause Agent and Ask What It's Doing
VibeIDE: Delete All Audit Logs (GDPR Erasure)

enumDescriptions: Manual 🟢 — Every agent action requires confirmation
Auto 🔴 — Agent works autonomously with budget limits
vibeide.trustScore.level.description: Trust Score level for agent autonomy

vibeide.safety.sessionTokenLimitEnabled.description: Enable session token limit to prevent unexpected costs

vibeide.safety.taskQueueTokenSplitEnable.description: When two or more agent tasks are queued or running, approximate the session token limit across tasks (requires `startNextQueued`/runner to mark tasks running; usage is estimated per LLM round-trip).

vibeide.planEventsJournal.enable.description: Append plan lifecycle JSON lines to `.vibe/plan-events.jsonl` (plan.created, plan.step.completed, …) for local automation.

vibeide.skills.workspaceDiscoveryHint.description: If the workspace loads Agent Skills from .vibe/skills/, show one info notification per window with sample ids and a button to open «Skills — select for session» (UX only; does not change rule precedence).

vibeide.agent.preferJsonToolArguments.description: Add system-message guidance: tool calls must use strictly valid JSON arguments (reduces parse retries; not full provider-level JSON Schema mode).

vibeide.safety.deadMansSwitchMinutes.description: Pause agent after N minutes without approval. 0 = disabled

vibeide.safety.loopDetectorThreshold.description: Pause agent after N identical consecutive actions

vibeide.agent.terminalOutputAwareness.description: Allow agent to see terminal output in real-time (opt-in)

vibeide.agent.thinkingOutLoud.description: Stream agent reasoning to Thinking panel (Claude 3.7+, o-series)

vibeide.agent.runTestsAfterApply.enabled.description: Run tests automatically after agent Apply

vibeide.agent.runTestsAfterApply.command.description: Test command to run after Apply (e.g. npm test, pytest, cargo test)

vibeide.context.warningThresholdPercent.description: Warn when context window is N% full

vibeide.context.criticalThresholdPercent.description: Show critical warning when context window is N% full

vibeide.output.structuredMode.description: Output agent actions as NDJSON to stdout (for SIEM/Splunk integration)

vibeide.audit.encryptLogs.description: Encrypt audit logs with user key (requires saving recovery phrase)
